pull.title: tests: update wycheproof files
pull.body:
Wycheproof ownership was recently moved to C2SP (https://github.com/C2SP/wycheproof). This PR updates all references to the new URL and bumps to the latest version of the vector files.

This commit does not change the content of processed .h testvector files. To test:
```
make clean-testvectors testvectors
```

See: https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1/pull/1492#discussion_r1572443456

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1
